name: IIT Roorkee – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow. Candidates with M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Roorkee official website iitr.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. (Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology / Civil Engineering / Environmental Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Materials Engineering) with GATE or M.Sc./M.Tech. (Chemistry / Physics / Materials / Environmental Chemistry) with NET/GATE

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
